text:
Rhasidat Adeleke finished fourth in the fastest 400m Olympic final of all time, missing out on a medal in her debut Games.

Mikey Stafford is joined by Jessie Barr and Raf Diallo from the bowels of the Stade de France to analyse the final won by Marileidy Paulino of the Dominican Republic.

Jessie puts some perspective of the scale of the achievement and the level of competitors she was facing, while Raf gives us a sesne of what it was like to watch an Irish woman contend in an Olympic sprint final.

We also hear from the woman herself, who was disappointed to miss out on a medal.

There is a boost for the 4x400m relay team however, who will welcome Adeleke into the team for Saturday's final - the final event of the Olympics track meet.

title: Adeleke fourth in fastest Olympic final ever? Pain
description: Mikey Stafford is joined by Jessie Barr and Raf Diallo from the bowels of the Stade de France to analyse the fastest 400m Olympic final of all time as Rhasidat Adeleke finished fourth behind Marileidy Paulino of the Dominican Republic.
